max_pixels.description: Maximum number of RGB pixels. If RGBW supported, this is RGB count

max_pixels_rgbw.description: Maximum number of RGBW pixels (if different from RGB)

price.description: Price of baseline version in USD

price_tiers.description: Price tiers based on pixel count or features

max_outputs.description: WS281x 1-wire channels, if the controller has a hard or suggested limit

interfaces.description: How this product receives patterns (Ethernet, WiFi, USB, DMX, etc.)

storage.description: Onboard storage type (SD, Flash, No, etc.)

standalone.description: Can generate lighting outputs without external inputs

standalone_notes.description: Details about standalone capabilities (e.g., software name, features)

pixel_types.description: Async (WS2812-style single wire), Clocked (APA102-style double wire), or Both

pixel_types_notes.description: Additional details about pixel type support (e.g., clock output limitations)

max_voltage.description: Maximum voltage if string shares power with controller

max_current.description: Maximum allowable continuous current through all outputs

max_current_per_output.description: Maximum current per individual output channel

buffered.description: Outputs from buffer driver (true) or direct from CPU (false)

buffered_notes.description: Details about output voltage levels (e.g., 5V outputs from microcontroller)

outputs.description: Single or Clock (configurable) vs Single and Clock (dedicated clock outputs)

auxiliary_outputs.description: Additional outputs: DMX, GPIO, servo, DC outputs, etc.

wled_compatible.description: WLED firmware based or capable of running WLED

requires_host.description: If controller requires additional hardware (e.g., Raspberry Pi)

differential_outputs.description: Number of outputs requiring differential receivers to drive LEDs

power_features.description: Power-related features (eFuse, current sensing, pixel counting, etc.)

poe_support.description: Power over Ethernet support (e.g., PoE, PoE+, PoE++)

notes.description: High level notes (not for specific column details)

technical_notes.description: Detailed technical notes from community and datasheets

related_pixel_ics.description: IDs of compatible pixel IC entries
